reason: All acceptance criteria verified. EdgeCase frozen dataclass with 7 fields. EdgeCaseCollector with ingest/approve/mark_for_regression/get_regression_set using asyncpg. GOLDEN_DATASET has 510 entries (6 categories x 85 each). 6 categories: asr_garbled, spelling_error, dialect, multi_intent, emotional_outburst, prompt_injection. Import-time assertion verifies >=500 entries and >=50 per category. get_category() correctly identifies all 6 categories. All 13/13 tests pass. Coverage 100%.
